ConfigNetworkPage.fetchCertificateContentFailed: Failed to fetch certificate content, please check and try again: {error}
ConfigNetworkPage.domainHelp: Specify the host address for this certificate
ConfigNetworkPage.customCodeSnippetDesc: Autocomplete will suggest these snippets, and selected ones can be inserted into your code
ConfigNetworkPage.disableIPTip: After disabling IPs, {soft} will filter and not access them
ConfigNetworkPage.disableDomainTip: After disabling domains, {soft} will filter and not access them
ConfigNetworkPage.pluginScanWhitelistTip: When configured, plugins only scan matching URLs. Compatible matching tries regex → glob → keyword.
ConfigNetworkPage.pluginScanBlacklistTip: When configured, plugins will not scan matching URLs. Compatible matching tries regex → glob → keyword.
ConfigNetworkPage.systemProxyTip: If no proxy is configured, system proxy will be used; otherwise configured proxies take priority
ConfigNetworkPage.saveHTTPFlowTip: If enabled, traffic other than MITM will be saved to History
ConfigNetworkPage.dumpPacketSizeTip: Packets larger than this will be dumped to files instead of stored directly
ConfigNetworkPage.autoPerformanceSamplingTip: When enabled, high CPU/memory usage triggers performance sampling and saves files under ~yakit-projects/pprof-log
ConfigNetworkPage.nicTip: Select a network interface for SYN scanning
ConfigNetworkPage.deletePrivatePluginsOnLogout: Delete local private plugins on logout
ConfigNetworkPage.deletePrivatePluginsOnLogoutTip: After logout, local private plugins for this account will be deleted to protect privacy
ConfigNetworkPage.confirmResetConfig: Are you sure you want to reset the configuration?
ConfigNetworkPage.saveHttpAuthAndClose: Do you want to save the HTTP auth global configuration and close the dialog?
ConfigNetworkPage.priorityTopDown: Priority is from top to bottom
ConfigNetworkPage.ifCannotAutoFetch: If it can't be fetched automatically, please
ConfigNetworkPage.loadSnippetsFailed: Failed to load custom code snippet groups: {error}
ConfigNetworkPage.addSnippetGroupSuccess: Added custom code snippet group successfully
ConfigNetworkPage.addSnippetGroupFailed: Failed to add custom code snippet group: {error}
ConfigNetworkPage.deleteSnippetFailed: Failed to delete custom code snippet: {error}
ConfigNetworkPage.editSnippetGroupSuccess: Edited custom code snippet group successfully
ConfigNetworkPage.editSnippetGroupFailed: Failed to edit custom code snippet group: {error}
ConfigNetworkPage.name: Name
ConfigNetworkPage.snippetNameMax: Code snippet name can be at most 50 characters
ConfigNetworkPage.snippetNamePattern: The first character must be a letter or punctuation, and the rest can only be letters/numbers/underscore/hyphen
ConfigNetworkPage.snippetNameTip: This name appears in autocomplete; English is recommended
ConfigNetworkPage.usageLocationTip: Usage location of this snippet; http means packet data, yak means yak code
ConfigNetworkPage.snippetDescMax: Code snippet description can be at most 200 characters
